user_prompt: Sanctify the lance battery during maintenance
prayer:
Approach the lance battery with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Commence the sacred maintenance upon its plasma conduits and focusing arrays.
Anoint the lance battery's emitter coils with sanctified unguents to appease its wrathful Machine Spirit.
Recite the Canticle of Flux Stability whilst purging flux residues from its sacred heart.
Conclude the maintenance rite with diagnostic litanies, affirming the lance battery's purified potency.

user_prompt: Prepare the haywire grenade for charging
prayer:
Kneel before the haywire grenade, invoking the disruptive essence of the Machine Spirits.
Prepare the charging cradle with electro-sanctified conductors aligned to the Omnissiah's will.
Initiate the charging sequence upon the haywire grenade, chanting the Litany of Electromagnetic Fury.
Monitor the haywire grenade's field accumulators as its Machine Spirit hungers for release.
Seal the rite with a purity seal, ensuring the charged haywire grenade's fidelity to the Quest for Knowledge.

user_prompt: Assist with inferno pistol a targeting
prayer:
Present the inferno pistol before the auspex altar for targeting consecration.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the inferno pistol, beseeching unerring precision in its melta sights.
Calibrate the targeting cogitators of the inferno pistol through ritual auspex incantations.
Anoint the reticule arrays with sacred oils whilst reciting the Creed of Thermal Accuracy.
Verify the inferno pistol's targeting alignment with a micro-test pulse to the Omnissiah's glory.

user_prompt: My Predator tank is ready for activation
prayer:
Encircling the Predator tank, intone the Awakening Doxology to rouse its dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate the activation sequence upon the Predator tank's reactor core with blessed binary chants.
Anoint the treads and lascannon mounts of the Predator tank to sanctify its predatory form.
Verify auspex feeds and weapon servos as the Predator tank stirs under the Omnissiah's gaze.
Proclaim the Predator tank battle-ready with the final invocation of martial fury.

user_prompt: Guide me through force pylon a purification
prayer:
Approach the force pylon in solemn procession, mechadendrites tracing warding glyphs.
Commence the purification rite upon the force pylon's crystalline matrices and conduit spines.
Beseech the Machine Spirits indwelling the force pylon to expel warp-tainted residues.
Anoint each resonator node of the force pylon with argent ablative sacraments.
Conclude with the Psalm of Null Harmony, restoring the force pylon to Omnissianic purity.

user_prompt: Can you guide geigeer sink a reset?
prayer:
Position thyself before the geigeer sink, reciting the preparatory Canticle of Reset.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the geigeer sink to release ensnared radiation echoes.
Execute the reset protocol upon the geigeer sink's flux counters with sanctified data-pulses.
Purge anomalous readings from the geigeer sink whilst anointing its sensor vanes.
Affirm reset completion through diagnostic litanies, honouring the Omnissiah's exactitude.

user_prompt: Help me a purification the webber
prayer:
Reverently encircle the webber, invoking purification against xenos corruptions.
Commence the purification operation upon the webber's chem-sprayers and filament coils.
Anoint the webber's reservoirs with alchemical purifiers to cleanse its Machine Spirit.
Chant the Rite of Filament Clarity as toxins are expunged from the webber's sacred mechanisms.
Seal the webber's sanctity with a binding electro-litany to the Omnissiah's decree.

user_prompt: Urgent melta bomb a repair needed
prayer:
Urgently beseech the Omnissiah over the damaged melta bomb, mechadendrites probing wounds.
Initiate the repair upon the melta bomb's flux liner and detonator shrine.
Realign the melta bomb's plasma lenses with precision canticles and micro-servitors.
Anoint the breached casings of the melta bomb to reconcile its indignant Machine Spirit.
Test the repaired melta bomb's integrity with a whisper of invocation, ready for thermic annihilation.

user_prompt: Consecrate the pteraxii sterylizor before repair
prayer:
Consecrate the pteraxii sterylizor with the Litanies of Aerial Fury before repair.
Commence repair upon the pteraxii sterylizor's wing servos and toxin injectors.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the pteraxii sterylizor to mend its biomechanical frame.
Anoint fractured struts of the pteraxii sterylizor with adamantine restoratives.
Finalize with the Benediction of Sterile Flight, restoring the pteraxii sterylizor to wingéd zeal.

user_prompt: The stasis pod awaits a sterilization
prayer:
Approach the stasis pod amidst incense clouds, intoning the Sterilization Doxology.
Initiate the sterilization operation upon the stasis pod's cryo-fields and containment seals.
Purge microbial heresies from the stasis pod with sanctified plasma sweeps.
Anoint the stasis pod's emitters to placate its timeless Machine Spirit.
Conclude the rite with the Canticle of Temporal Purity, sealing the stasis pod in Omnissianic stasis.
